arcade.name: Millrace Arcade
arcade.summary: Playable browser games from Millrace, led by Corebound's v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough release, Dark Factory Dispatch's v0.4.0 Freight Lockdown, and Void Prospector's v0.3.0 Beacon Convoy route-escort release.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: Pilot Mantis-01 through a compact overlay HUD, keyboard and touch menu surfaces, surface dock services, richer material strata, embedded ore and hazard pockets, smooth drill breakthrough feedback, and progressively revealed contracts, Deep Charters, late routes, archives, relay utilities, upgrades, and research.

release.label: v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough
release.copy: HUD Breakthrough keeps the mine dominant with a compressed overlay, moves detail into the shared menu surface, preserves surface dock actions, enriches strata and embedded ore or hazard pockets, and lets drilled blocks break open with continuous breakthrough motion instead of a cell-center snap.

versions.label: v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough
versions.summary: Compact overlay HUD, surface dock services, richer strata, embedded ore and hazard pockets, smooth breakthrough release motion, and subtler grid readability publish on top of the Viewport Material release.

versions.label: v0.6.0 Viewport Material
versions.summary: Viewport-fitted HUD, menu and surface dock services, material terrain rendering, embedded ore and hazard pockets, and material motion feedback publish on top of the Resistance Start release.

versions.label: v0.5.0 Resistance Start
versions.summary: Stateful drill resistance, terrain-hardness contact progress, first-session objectives, persistent menu help, and staged system reveals land on top of the Natural Motion asset release.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Natural Motion
versions.summary: Continuous held-input rig motion, camera-follow drilling, generated bitmap terrain and vehicle assets, surface facilities, ore or hazard readables, HUD icons, and visible upgrade or research identity land on top of the Deep Charter release.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Deep Charter
versions.summary: Deep Charters, late routes, choir trench rewards, and anchor recall extend the Corebound run beyond the v0.2.0 contract/archive foundation.

versions.label: v0.2.0 continuity
versions.summary: Contracts, archive sigils, relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant support now connect the mine run to visible long-term progression.

games.title: Dark Factory Dispatch
games.summary: Run a compact machine-intelligence factory through Freight Lockdown shifts with outbound freight manifests, dock loading windows, staged cargo, carrier seals, launch clearance, route-security escorts, reroute decisions, cargo-integrity outcomes, Signal Breach intrusion, Grid Siege power routing, audit relay directives, emergency coolant-diversion orders, lane overdrive calls, persistent scars, and upgrade decisions between shifts.

release.label: v0.4.0 Freight Lockdown
release.copy: Freight Lockdown adds outbound logistics pressure to Signal Breach: stage cargo into freight manifests, inspect dock seals, assign escort drones or defense screens, spend reserve clearance, reroute contaminated sectors, hold launch windows, seal carriers, and resolve full, partial, or failed cargo outcomes while Grid Siege, breach containment, emergency queue policy, and lane overdrive calls keep pushing back.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Freight Lockdown
versions.summary: Outbound freight manifests, dock loading windows, cargo staging, carrier seals, route-security escorts, reserve launch clearance, reroutes around contaminated sectors, cargo-integrity outcomes, and freight carryover publish on top of the Signal Breach release.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Signal Breach
versions.summary: Hostile signal intrusion, compromised queue entries, trace deadlines, lane quarantine, reserve-powered sector shields, countermeasure jobs, and persistent breach scars publish on top of the Grid Siege release.

versions.label: v0.2.0 Grid Siege
versions.summary: Facility power routing, reserve batteries, blackout lockouts, Reserve Ledger Audit directives, and carryover grid scars publish on top of Escalation Shift's emergency queue and lane overdrive loop.

versions.label: v0.1.0 Escalation Shift
versions.summary: Escalating shift demand, emergency coolant-diversion contracts, emergency-first queue policy, lane overdrive decisions, persistent restart ledger carryover, and the original three-lane factory dispatch board.

versions.label: v0.0.1 Dispatch Floor
versions.summary: Three-lane factory dispatch board with queued jobs, timed contracts, recoverable material and logic faults, upgrade choices, and original local lane, job, fault, and title-card art.

games.title: Void Prospector
games.summary: Pilot the Prospector Kite through a compact 3D asteroid field with Survey Ladder sectors, anomaly scans, hazard charting, salvage extraction, deployable route beacons, convoy contracts, escort integrity, pirate interdiction, station escort drones, signal jammers, countermeasure bursts, docking, charter payouts, and repeat-sortie upgrades.

release.label: v0.3.0 Beacon Convoy
release.copy: Beacon Convoy adds deployable route beacons and escort runs to Derelict Salvage: scan prerequisites, deploy or maintain relay beacons, launch cargo convoys, hold formation through ambush and hazard pressure, buy escort drones or signal jammers at station, and bank full or partial payouts into Survey Ladder progress.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Beacon Convoy
versions.summary: Deployable route beacons, convoy cargo runs, escort integrity, ambush and hazard pressure, station escort drones, signal jammers, countermeasure bursts, and full or partial convoy payouts publish on top of Derelict Salvage.

versions.label: v0.2.0 Derelict Salvage
versions.summary: Selectable relay caches, derelict hulls, volatile wreckage, signal locks, extraction pressure, station rig and recovery drone support, salvage value, and relic recovery publish on top of the Survey Ladder campaign.

versions.label: v0.1.0 Survey Ladder
versions.summary: Three-sector Survey Ladder campaign with route selection, anomaly scans, hazard charting, station probe and decoy services, tiered pirate pressure, and the original mining, docking, upgrade, and local-asset flight loop.

versions.label: v0.0.1 First Sortie
versions.summary: Local Three.js flight shell with connected mining, docking, charter, upgrade, pirate-pressure loop, and original project-local ship, asteroid, station, hostile-marker, and title-card art.
